overall.description: A third-person game sequence showing a character in a red dress walking through a foggy gothic ruin environment. The character transitions from torch-lit indoor stone corridors up a staircase and out into misty coastal ruins, following a winding path alongside water.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
wall-mounted iron torch holder with flickering flame
weathered stone paving on the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed stone corridor with rough-hewn walls. Warm torchlight illuminates the path ahead as the character moves steadily forward through the medieval interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending toward outdoor exit

events.description: natural light becomes visible at the top of the staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the worn stone staircase toward the exit archway

entered.detail: steep stone steps with worn edges leading upward
large pointed stone archway marking the transition to outdoors

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase within the enclosed structure. As they climb, natural light becomes visible through the gothic archway at the top, signaling the approaching exit from the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic ruin courtyard with overgrown vegetation

events.description: character exits the stone building into the foggy outdoor ruins
lighting shifts from warm torchlight to cool foggy daylight

agents.ego_description: walking out of the ruins into the open courtyard, transitioning from indoor to outdoor environment

entered.detail: massive stone archway remnants of the abbey structure
stone pedestal emitting an ethereal blue magical light
calm water visible through the fog in the distance
tall wild grass growing between the stone ruins

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stone structure into a wide, foggy ruin courtyard dominated by massive gothic arches. A glowing blue shrine sits to the left as the character walks past the ruins toward the coastal path, with the lighting shifting dramatically from warm interior to cool, misty exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal trail alongside water with rocky outcrops

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the winding coastal path
path becomes more rocky and elevated along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy coastal trail, navigating the winding path beside the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with a lit lantern guiding the path
tall stone tower visible through the fog on the distant cliff
jagged rock formations lining the coastal path

segments.scene_description: The character follows a winding dirt trail through tall grass along the foggy coastline. A wooden lantern post appears on the left, and the path becomes increasingly rocky as it hugs the cliff edge. The water remains visible to the right while distant structures loom through the mist ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a warm, enclosed gothic interior into a cool, misty coastal wasteland. It begins with the character walking through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by flickering torchlight before ascending a steep staircase toward a distant glow of natural light. As the character passes through a gothic archway, the scene opens into a wide, foggy courtyard where the warm interior tones shift to a cool palette, passing a glowing blue shrine among massive ruins. The camera then follows the character as they leave the stone structures behind, moving along a winding dirt trail through tall grass and past a wooden lantern post. Finally, the path becomes increasingly rocky as it hugs the cliff edge, with the coastline and distant ruins looming through the dense mist.
